channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utes out of bowl game contention after 31-28 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down to their fifth-string quarterback, the Utes football team almost pulled out a spectacular comeback against #22 Iowa State, only to lose its seventh straight game, 31-28.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Barnes leads Aggies to 41-20 win over SDSU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a rough start to the season, Utah State is finishing strong. Bryson Barnes accounted for 323 yards and four touchdowns to lead Utah State over San Diego State 41-20 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Silver Bowl champs! McClymonds too much for Oakland in section title showdown
item.description: 2024 Oakland Section championship: McClymonds wins 15th consecutive Silver Bowl as Berell Staples throws for two touchdowns
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Devin Neal scores 4 times, Kansas beats No. 16 Colorado 37-21 as Buffs' Big 12 title hopes take hit
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Devin Neal ran for 207 yards and three touchdowns, caught four passes for 80 yards and another score, and led Kansas to a 37-21 victory over No. 16 Colorado on Saturday that dealt a big blow to the Buffaloes' hopes of playing for the Big 12 title.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 24 Illinois stuns Rutgers on Bryant's 40-yard TD reception with 4 seconds left
item.description: PISCATAWAY, N.J. (AP) — Trailing by one at the 40-yard line with 14 seconds to play and no timeouts, Illinois coach Bret Bielema sent in a play known as “church” to Luke Altmyer. The quarterback was to hit a receiver who was to go to the ground immediately.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Argentina's Racing wins its first Copa Sudamericana championship by beating Brazil's Cruzeiro 3-1
item.description: ASUNCION, Paraguay (AP) — Gaston Martirena and Adrian Martinez scored first-half goals as Argentina's Racing won its first Copa Sudamericana championship by beating Brazil's Cruzeiro 3-1 in the final on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: TEXANS NEWSLETTER: Taking on the Titans
item.description: Hey guys, it’s Ari Alexander - back from vacation back in time to watch the Texans pull away from the Cowboys Monday night and show some flashes of how good this team can be, along with some issues that need to be fixed if the Texans are going to have any shot to make a real run in the AFC Playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Michael Horton, Ari Alexander, Holly Galvan Posey, KPRC 2

item.title: Former All-Pro Chad 'Ochocinco' Johnson says he used to soak ankles in teammates' urine to stay healthy
item.description: Chad Johnson revealed the secret sauce that kept him healthy throughout his 11-year NFL career. He soaked his ankles in his teammates' urine.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Giants star Sterling Shepard reveals details on team's culture amid fallout from Daniel Jones' exit
item.description: Sterling Shepard, who spent his first eight seasons with the New York Giants, does not appear to be fond of quarterback Daniel Jones' unceremonious exit.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Russell puts Mercedes on pole at Las Vegas and Verstappen nips Norris in championship battle
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — George Russell put Mercedes on the pole for the Las Vegas Grand Prix in an upset over teammate Lewis Hamilton, who had been considered the favorite but struggled in Friday night's final qualifying session.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Austin Hays, Kyle Finnegan, Brendan Rodgers and Jordan Romano among 62 new free agents
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Outfielder Austin Hays and right-hander Kyle Finnegan — both former All-Stars — and second baseman Brendan Rodgers were among 62 players who became free agents Friday when their teams failed to offer 2025 contracts.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Local fighter wins WBC Muy Thai world title
item.description: Selina Flores, 26, recently won the WBC Muy Thai world title, making history as the third American woman to ever do so.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: 2024 F1 Las Vegas Grand Prix preview: Racing down the Strip
item.description: The 2024 Formula 1 World Championship heads to Las Vegas this weekend for what will be the third to last race of the season.
item.dc:creator: Viknesh Vijayenthiran - Motor Authority, Fox 5

item.title: Crimson Cliffs pulls off miraculous comeback to win 4A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was simply one of the best, most dramatic games in Utah high school football championship game history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose football aims to earn spot in 4A final four
item.description: The only Western Slope high school football team still alive and still fighting for a title is the 11-0 Montrose Red Hawks, the 2-seed in 4A.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Ohtani wins unanimous MVP after historic first season with Dodgers
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers' superstar Shohei Ohtani is the 2024 National League Most Valuable Player. It was a unanimous decision to award the Japanese phenom the 2024 MVP, and in doing so, create another historic moment as he becomes the first full-time designated hitter to win it.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Mike Evans trending towards playing against the Giants on Sunday
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are looking to get back on track after four straight losses against the Giants, who swapped starting quarterbacks after losing five in a row.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz lose to Lakers, fall to 3-11 this season
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - While the Lakers' two all-stars LeBron James and Anthony Davis had their way with the Utah Jazz Tuesday night, it was L.A.'s rookie that did the most damage.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Alex Killorn helps the Ducks beat the Blackhawks 3-2 for their third straight win
item.description: Alex Killorn had a goal and an assist in the third period, and the Anaheim Ducks beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Tuesday night for their season-high third straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lynne Roberts leaves Utah for WNBA job
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a shocking announcement Tuesday evening, Lynne Roberts is leaving the University of Utah women's basketball program to become the head coach of the Los Angeles Sparks of the WNBA.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox call up Colson Montgomery, Juan Carela from minor leagues
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have selected the contracts of shortstop Colson Montgomery and right-handed pitcher Juan Carela, both of whom are highly rated in the organization, to their 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls great Bob Love dead at 81 after battle with cancer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — An all-star for the Chicago Bulls in the 1970's, franchise great Bob Love has died at the age of 81 after a long battle with cancer, the team announced Monday. Love played from 1968 to 1976 with the Chicago Bulls and was affectionately nicknamed "Butterbean" for his kind demeanor.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utes hope to end six-game slide against Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah football team will try to end its longest losing streak in 22 years when they take on #22 Iowa State Saturday in their home finale at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USD Men's Soccer to host UC Davis in NCAA Tournament
item.description: The Toreros are going to the big dance, though they don't necessarily like the song that's playing. The Toreros earned an automatic bid to the NCAA Tournament after they captured their third straight West Coast Conference Title on Saturday with their (1-0) win over Loyola Marymount.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Southwest employee welcomes Chiefs fans by playing Bills song over intercom
item.description: She said she wanted to let Chiefs fans know that "the Buffalo Bills have the best fans in the league.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Minkewicz, NewsNation

item.title: Beyoncé performing at halftime of NFL Christmas Day game on Netflix
item.description: Beyoncé is coming to your home on Christmas — provided you have Netflix and are tuning in to the Baltimore Ravens-Houston Texans game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Kris Byrant's Lamborghini Huracan stolen from Colorado home
item.description: Kris Bryant's Lamborghini Huracan was stolen by a multi-state vehicle theft ring, but was recovered by police in Las Vegas after they traced the stolen vehicle to a home in the city.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC
